  1288	    function _installMission(Mission storage m, ClanOrder calldata order, Clansman storage cs, OrderCtx memory ctx)
  1289	        internal
  1290	    {

  1312	        m.maxGoldIn = order.maxGoldIn;

  1314	        if (m.marketMode == MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled) {
  1315	            _marketMissionCommitSequence[cs.clansmanId] = _world.nextCommitSequence++;
  1316	        } else {
  1317	            delete _marketMissionCommitSequence[cs.clansmanId];
  1318	        }
  1319	    }

  1378	    /// @dev Execute the full scheduled market queue for the given tick, then delete it.
  1379	    function _executeScheduledMarketActions(uint64 tick) internal {
  1380	        ScheduledMarketAction[] storage actions = _scheduledMarketActions[tick];
  1381	        uint256 len = actions.length;
  1382	        if (len == 0) return;
  1383	
  1384	        _sortScheduledMarketActionsByCommitSequence(actions);
  1385	
  1386	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < len; i++) {
  1387	            ScheduledMarketAction storage sma = actions[i];
  1388	
  1389	            // Validate clansman still belongs to the clan
  1390	            Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[sma.clansmanId];
  1391	            if (cs.clanId != sma.clanId || cs.state == ClansmanState.DEAD) {
  1392	                _emitMarketActionFailed(
  1393	                    sma.clanId,
  1394	                    sma.clansmanId,
  1395	                    sma.action,
  1396	                    MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1397	                    StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_CLANSMAN,
  1398	                    tick
  1399	                );
  1400	                continue;
  1401	            }
  1402	
  1403	            // Guard: clansman was re-tasked if mission action no longer matches the queued type.
  1404	            // Note: _completeMission sets m.active=false during settlement (by design), so we
  1405	            // cannot use m.active as a validity signal here — check action type and nonce.
  1406	            Mission storage m = _missions[sma.clansmanId];
  1407	            if (m.action != sma.action || m.nonce != sma.missionNonce) {
  1408	                _emitMarketActionFailed(
  1409	                    sma.clanId,
  1410	                    sma.clansmanId,
  1411	                    sma.action,
  1412	                    MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1413	                    StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION,
  1414	                    tick
  1415	                );
  1416	                continue;
  1417	            }
  1418	
  1419	            if (sma.action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  1420	                try this._executeMarketSellExternal(
  1421	                    tick, sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.marketToken, sma.marketAmount
  1422	                ) returns (
  1423	                    StatusCode marketStatus
  1424	                ) {
  1425	                    marketStatus;
  1426	                } catch {
  1427	                    _handleMarketFailure(
  1428	                        sma.clanId,
  1429	                        sma.clansmanId,
  1430	                        sma.action,
  1431	                        MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1432	                        StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1433	                        tick
  1434	                    );
  1435	                }
  1436	            } else if (sma.action == ActionType.MarketBuy) {
  1437	                try this._executeMarketBuyExternal(
  1438	                    tick, sma.clanId, sma.clansmanId, sma.marketToken, sma.marketAmount, sma.maxGoldIn
  1439	                ) returns (
  1440	                    StatusCode marketStatus
  1441	                ) {
  1442	                    marketStatus;
  1443	                } catch {
  1444	                    _handleMarketFailure(
  1445	                        sma.clanId,
  1446	                        sma.clansmanId,
  1447	                        sma.action,
  1448	                        MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1449	                        StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1450	                        tick
  1451	                    );
  1452	                }
  1453	            }
  1454	        }
  1455	
  1456	        delete _scheduledMarketActions[tick];
  1457	    }
  1458	
  1459	    function _sortScheduledMarketActionsByCommitSequence(ScheduledMarketAction[] storage actions) internal {
  1460	        uint256 len = actions.length;
  1461	        if (len <= 1) return;
  1462	        ScheduledMarketAction[] memory arr = new ScheduledMarketAction[](len);
  1463	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < len; i++) {
  1464	            arr[i] = actions[i];
  1465	        }
  1466	        for (uint256 i = 1; i < len; i++) {
  1467	            ScheduledMarketAction memory key = arr[i];
  1468	            uint256 j = i;
  1469	            while (j > 0 && arr[j - 1].commitSequence > key.commitSequence) {
  1470	                arr[j] = arr[j - 1];
  1471	                j--;
  1472	            }
  1473	            arr[j] = key;
  1474	        }
  1475	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < len; i++) {
  1476	            actions[i] = arr[i];
  1477	        }
  1478	    }
  1479	
  1480	    /// @dev External wrapper for _executeMarketSell — enables try/catch from heartbeat loop.
  1481	    function _executeMarketSellExternal(
  1482	        uint64 closedTick,
  1483	        uint32 clanId,
  1484	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1485	        address token,
  1486	        uint256 amount
  1487	    ) external returns (StatusCode) {
  1488	        require(msg.sender == address(this), "ClanWorld: internal only");
  1489	        return _executeMarketSell(closedTick, clanId, clansmanId, token, amount);
  1490	    }
  1491	
  1492	    /// @dev External wrapper for _executeMarketBuy — enables try/catch from heartbeat loop.
  1493	    function _executeMarketBuyExternal(
  1494	        uint64 closedTick,
  1495	        uint32 clanId,
  1496	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1497	        address token,
  1498	        uint256 amountOut,
  1499	        uint256 maxGoldIn
  1500	    ) external returns (StatusCode) {
  1501	        require(msg.sender == address(this), "ClanWorld: internal only");
  1502	        return _executeMarketBuy(closedTick, clanId, clansmanId, token, amountOut, maxGoldIn);
  1503	    }
  1504	
  1505	    /// @dev Map a resource token address to its pool address.
  1506	    function _poolFor(address token) internal view returns (address pool) {
  1507	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) return _treasury.woodGoldPool;
  1508	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) return _treasury.ironGoldPool;
  1509	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) return _treasury.wheatGoldPool;
  1510	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) return _treasury.fishGoldPool;
  1511	        return address(0);
  1512	    }
  1513	
  1514	    /// @dev Map a market token address to the canonical uint8 resource id used by market events.
  1515	    function _marketResourceForToken(address token) internal view returns (uint8) {
  1516	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) return uint8(ResourceType.Wood);
  1517	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) return uint8(ResourceType.Iron);
  1518	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) return uint8(ResourceType.Wheat);
  1519	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) return uint8(ResourceType.Fish);
  1520	        if (token == _treasury.goldToken) return ClanWorldConstants.RESOURCE_GOLD;
  1521	        revert("ClanWorld: invalid market resource");
  1522	    }
  1523	
  1524	    function _emitMarketActionFailed(
  1525	        uint32 clanId,
  1526	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1527	        ActionType action,
  1528	        MarketExecutionMode mode,
  1529	        StatusCode reason,
  1530	        uint64 tick
  1531	    ) internal {
  1532	        emit MarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, action, mode, reason, tick);
  1533	    }
  1534	
  1535	    /// @dev Add an amount of a resource token to the clan vault.
  1536	    function _addToVault(Clan storage clan, address token, uint256 amount) internal {
  1537	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1538	            clan.vaultWood += amount;
  1539	            return;
  1540	        }
  1541	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1542	            clan.vaultIron += amount;
  1543	            return;
  1544	        }
  1545	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1546	            clan.vaultWheat += amount;
  1547	            return;
  1548	        }
  1549	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1550	            clan.vaultFish += amount;
  1551	            return;
  1552	        }
  1553	    }
  1554	
  1555	    /// @dev Deduct an amount of a resource token from the clan vault. Returns false if insufficient.
  1556	    function _deductFromVault(Clan storage clan, address token, uint256 amount) internal returns (bool) {
  1557	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1558	            if (clan.vaultWood < amount) return false;
  1559	            clan.vaultWood -= amount;
  1560	            return true;
  1561	        }
  1562	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1563	            if (clan.vaultIron < amount) return false;
  1564	            clan.vaultIron -= amount;
  1565	            return true;
  1566	        }
  1567	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1568	            if (clan.vaultWheat < amount) return false;
  1569	            clan.vaultWheat -= amount;
  1570	            return true;
  1571	        }
  1572	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1573	            if (clan.vaultFish < amount) return false;
  1574	            clan.vaultFish -= amount;
  1575	            return true;
  1576	        }
  1577	        return false;
  1578	    }
  1579	
  1580	    function _hasCarryBalance(Clansman storage cs, address token, uint256 amount) internal view returns (bool) {
  1581	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) return cs.carryWood >= amount;
  1582	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) return cs.carryIron >= amount;
  1583	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) return cs.carryWheat >= amount;
  1584	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) return cs.carryFish >= amount;
  1585	        return false;
  1586	    }
  1587	
  1588	    function _deductFromCarry(Clansman storage cs, address token, uint256 amount) internal returns (bool) {
  1589	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1590	            if (cs.carryWood < amount) return false;
  1591	            cs.carryWood -= amount;
  1592	            return true;
  1593	        }
  1594	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1595	            if (cs.carryIron < amount) return false;
  1596	            cs.carryIron -= amount;
  1597	            return true;
  1598	        }
  1599	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1600	            if (cs.carryWheat < amount) return false;
  1601	            cs.carryWheat -= amount;
  1602	            return true;
  1603	        }
  1604	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1605	            if (cs.carryFish < amount) return false;
  1606	            cs.carryFish -= amount;
  1607	            return true;
  1608	        }
  1609	        return false;
  1610	    }
  1611	
  1612	    function _addToCarry(Clansman storage cs, address token, uint256 amount) internal {
  1613	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) { cs.carryWood += amount; return; }
  1614	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) { cs.carryIron += amount; return; }
  1615	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) { cs.carryWheat += amount; return; }
  1616	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) { cs.carryFish += amount; return; }
  1617	    }
  1618	
  1619	    /// @dev Check a clan vault balance without mutating storage.
  1620	    function _hasVaultBalance(Clan storage clan, address token, uint256 amount) internal view returns (bool) {
  1621	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) return clan.vaultWood >= amount;
  1622	        if (token == _treasury.ironToken) return clan.vaultIron >= amount;
  1623	        if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) return clan.vaultWheat >= amount;
  1624	        if (token == _treasury.fishToken) return clan.vaultFish >= amount;
  1625	        return false;
  1626	    }
  1627	
  1628	    function _handleMarketFailure(
  1629	        uint32 clanId,
  1630	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1631	        ActionType action,
  1632	        MarketExecutionMode mode,
  1633	        StatusCode reason,
  1634	        uint64 tick
  1635	    ) internal returns (StatusCode) {
  1636	        Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[clansmanId];
  1637	        if (cs.clansmanId != 0 && cs.state != ClansmanState.DEAD) {
  1638	            cs.state = ClansmanState.WAITING;
  1639	            cs.cooldownEndsAtTs = uint64(block.timestamp) + ClanWorldConstants.CLANSMAN_COOLDOWN_SECONDS;
  1640	        }
  1641	        _emitMarketActionFailed(clanId, clansmanId, action, mode, reason, tick);
  1642	        return reason;
  1643	    }
  1644	
  1645	    function _remainingCarryForToken(Clansman storage cs, address token) internal view returns (uint256) {
  1646	        uint256 carried;
  1647	        uint256 cap;
  1648	        if (token == _treasury.woodToken) {
  1649	            carried = cs.carryWood;
  1650	            cap = ClanWorldConstants.WOOD_CAP;
  1651	        } else if (token == _treasury.ironToken) {
  1652	            carried = cs.carryIron;
  1653	            cap = ClanWorldConstants.IRON_CAP;
  1654	        } else if (token == _treasury.wheatToken) {
  1655	            carried = cs.carryWheat;
  1656	            cap = ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_CAP;
  1657	        } else if (token == _treasury.fishToken) {
  1658	            carried = cs.carryFish;
  1659	            cap = ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP;
  1660	        } else {
  1661	            return 0;
  1662	        }
  1663	
  1664	        if (carried >= cap) return 0;
  1665	        return cap - carried;
  1666	    }
  1667	
  1668	    function _executeImmediateMarket(uint32 clanId, ClanOrder calldata order, uint32 clansmanId)
  1669	        internal
  1670	        returns (StatusCode)
  1671	    {
  1672	        if (order.action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  1673	            return _executeImmediateMarketSell(clanId, clansmanId, order.marketToken, order.marketAmount);
  1674	        }
  1675	        return _executeImmediateMarketBuy(clanId, clansmanId, order.marketToken, order.marketAmount, order.maxGoldIn);
  1676	    }
  1677	
  1678	    function _executeImmediateMarketSell(uint32 clanId, uint32 clansmanId, address token, uint256 amount)
  1679	        internal
  1680	        returns (StatusCode)
  1681	    {
  1682	        if (!_treasury.poolsSeeded) {
  1683	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1684	                clanId,
  1685	                clansmanId,
  1686	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1687	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1688	                StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN,
  1689	                _world.currentTick
  1690	            );
  1691	        }
  1692	        address poolAddr = _poolFor(token);
  1693	        if (poolAddr == address(0)) {
  1694	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1695	                clanId,
  1696	                clansmanId,
  1697	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1698	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1699	                StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN,
  1700	                _world.currentTick
  1701	            );
  1702	        }
  1703	
  1704	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1705	        Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[clansmanId];
  1706	        if (!_hasCarryBalance(cs, token, amount)) {
  1707	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1708	                clanId,
  1709	                clansmanId,
  1710	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1711	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1712	                StatusCode.ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES,
  1713	                _world.currentTick
  1714	            );
  1715	        }
  1716	
  1717	        // CEI: deduct carry before external call
  1718	        if (!_deductFromCarry(cs, token, amount)) {
  1719	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1720	                clanId,
  1721	                clansmanId,
  1722	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1723	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1724	                StatusCode.ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES,
  1725	                _world.currentTick
  1726	            );
  1727	        }
  1728	
  1729	        try StubPool(poolAddr).swapExactInForOut(amount, 1) returns (uint256 goldOut) {
  1730	            clan.goldBalance += goldOut;
  1731	            emit ImmediateMarketActionExecuted(
  1732	                clanId,
  1733	                clansmanId,
  1734	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1735	                _marketResourceForToken(token),
  1736	                amount,
  1737	                ClanWorldConstants.RESOURCE_GOLD,
  1738	                goldOut,
  1739	                _world.currentTick
  1740	            );
  1741	            return StatusCode.OK;
  1742	        } catch {
  1743	            _addToCarry(cs, token, amount); // restore carry on swap failure
  1744	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1745	                clanId,
  1746	                clansmanId,
  1747	                ActionType.MarketSell,
  1748	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1749	                StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1750	                _world.currentTick
  1751	            );
  1752	        }
  1753	    }
  1754	
  1755	    function _executeImmediateMarketBuy(
  1756	        uint32 clanId,
  1757	        uint32 clansmanId,
  1758	        address token,
  1759	        uint256 amountOut,
  1760	        uint256 maxGoldIn
  1761	    ) internal returns (StatusCode) {
  1762	        if (!_treasury.poolsSeeded) {

  1766	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1767	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1768	                StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN,
  1769	                _world.currentTick
  1770	            );
  1771	        }
  1772	        address poolAddr = _poolFor(token);
  1773	        if (poolAddr == address(0)) {
  1774	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1775	                clanId,
  1776	                clansmanId,
  1777	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1778	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1779	                StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN,
  1780	                _world.currentTick
  1781	            );
  1782	        }
  1783	
  1784	        Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[clansmanId];
  1785	        if (amountOut > _remainingCarryForToken(cs, token)) {
  1786	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1787	                clanId,
  1788	                clansmanId,
  1789	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1790	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1791	                StatusCode.ERR_CARRY_FULL,
  1792	                _world.currentTick
  1793	            );
  1794	        }
  1795	
  1796	        uint256 goldIn;
  1797	        try StubPool(poolAddr).getAmountInForExactOut(amountOut) returns (uint256 quotedGoldIn) {
  1798	            goldIn = quotedGoldIn;
  1799	        } catch {
  1800	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1801	                clanId,
  1802	                clansmanId,
  1803	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1804	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1805	                StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1806	                _world.currentTick
  1807	            );
  1808	        }
  1809	
  1810	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1811	        if (goldIn > maxGoldIn) {
  1812	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1813	                clanId,
  1814	                clansmanId,
  1815	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1816	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1817	                StatusCode.ERR_MAX_GOLD_IN_EXCEEDED,
  1818	                _world.currentTick
  1819	            );
  1820	        }
  1821	        if (clan.goldBalance < goldIn) {
  1822	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1823	                clanId,
  1824	                clansmanId,
  1825	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1826	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1827	                StatusCode.ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_GOLD,
  1828	                _world.currentTick
  1829	            );
  1830	        }
  1831	
  1832	        try StubPool(poolAddr).swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(amountOut, maxGoldIn) returns (uint256 actualGoldIn) {
  1833	            clan.goldBalance -= actualGoldIn;
  1834	            _addToCarry(cs, token, amountOut);
  1835	            emit ImmediateMarketActionExecuted(
  1836	                clanId,
  1837	                clansmanId,
  1838	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1839	                ClanWorldConstants.RESOURCE_GOLD,
  1840	                actualGoldIn,
  1841	                _marketResourceForToken(token),
  1842	                amountOut,
  1843	                _world.currentTick
  1844	            );
  1845	            return StatusCode.OK;
  1846	        } catch {
  1847	            return _handleMarketFailure(
  1848	                clanId,
  1849	                clansmanId,
  1850	                ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1851	                MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
  1852	                StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1853	                _world.currentTick
  1854	            );
  1855	        }
  1856	    }

  2023	
  2024	    function _validateAction(Clan storage clan, Clansman storage cs, ClanOrder calldata order, uint8 gotoRegion)
  2025	        internal
  2026	        view
  2027	        returns (StatusCode)
  2028	    {
  2029	        ActionType action = order.action;
  2030	
  2031	        if (action == ActionType.None) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION;
  2032	
  2033	        // DepositResources: must go to homebase
  2034	        if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
  2035	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2036	        }
  2037	
  2038	        // BuildWall / UpgradeBase / UpgradeMonument: must go to homebase
  2039	        if (action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase || action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument)
  2040	        {
  2041	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_NOT_AT_HOMEBASE;
  2042	        }
  2043	
  2044	        // ChopWood: must go to Forest
  2045	        if (action == ActionType.ChopWood) {
  2046	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2047	        }
  2048	        // MineIron: must go to Mountains
  2049	        if (action == ActionType.MineIron) {
  2050	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_MOUNTAINS) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2051	        }
  2052	        // FishDocks: must go to WestDocks or EastDocks
  2053	        if (action == ActionType.FishDocks) {
  2054	            if (
  2055	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_DOCKS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_DOCKS
  2056	            ) {
  2057	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2058	            }
  2059	        }
  2060	        // FishDeepSea: must go to DeepSea
  2061	        if (action == ActionType.FishDeepSea) {
  2062	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_DEEP_SEA) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2063	        }
  2064	        // HarvestWheat: must go to WestFarms or EastFarms
  2065	        if (action == ActionType.HarvestWheat) {
  2066	            if (
  2067	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS
  2068	            ) {
  2069	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2070	            }
  2071	        }
  2072	
  2073	        if (action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
  2074	            return _validateDefendBaseOrder(clan, order, gotoRegion);
  2075	        }
  2076	
  2077	        // MarketBuy/MarketSell: must target Unicorn Town
  2078	        if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  2079	            if (_treasury.woodToken == address(0)) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2080	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN) {
  2081	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2082	            }
  2083	            if (order.marketAmount == 0) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_ZERO_AMOUNT;
  2084	            // Validate token is a supported resource token (not gold itself)
  2085	            address tok = order.marketToken;
  2086	            if (tok == address(0) || tok == _treasury.goldToken) {
  2087	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2088	            }
  2089	            if (
  2090	                tok != _treasury.woodToken && tok != _treasury.ironToken && tok != _treasury.wheatToken
  2091	                    && tok != _treasury.fishToken
  2092	            ) {
  2093	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2094	            }
  2095	            // Over-capacity buys are rejected at submission; no partial fills or overflow refunds.
  2096	            if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy && order.marketAmount > _remainingCarryForToken(cs, tok)) {
  2097	                return StatusCode.ERR_CARRY_FULL;
  2098	            }
  2099	            // Immediate market orders execute during submitClanOrders when the
  2100	            // worker is waiting in Unicorn Town and off cooldown. Other valid
  2101	            // market orders enqueue when the scheduled mission resolves.
  2102	            if (cs.currentRegion == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN && cs.state == ClansmanState.WAITING) {
  2103	                // Already at Unicorn Town — immediate if off cooldown, scheduled otherwise.
  2104	            }
  2105	        }
  2106	
  2107	        cs; // suppress unused warning
  2108	        return StatusCode.OK;
  2109	    }
  2110	
  2111	    function _validateDefendBaseOrder(Clan storage clan, ClanOrder calldata order, uint8 gotoRegion)
  2112	        internal
  2113	        view
  2114	        returns (StatusCode)
  2115	    {
  2116	        if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2117	        if (order.targetClanId != 0 && order.targetClanId != clan.clanId) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_TARGET;
  2118	        return StatusCode.OK;
  2119	    }

codex
A likely issue is already emerging: buy capacity is checked before a market order is accepted, but sell carry balance is not checked at submission, and the immediate path reports `OK` even when the swap helper returned a failure status. I’m checking whether that is intentional “accepted but failed” semantics or a real contract/API mismatch.
exec

   360	        if (fromTick >= curTick) return;
   361	
   362	        // Cap ticks settled per call to prevent block gas limit issues
   363	        uint64 maxSettleTicks = 200;
   364	        if (curTick > fromTick + maxSettleTicks) {
   365	            curTick = fromTick + maxSettleTicks;
   366	        }
   367	
   368	        uint32[] storage clansmanIds = _clanClansmanIds[clanId];
   369	
   370	        // Settle tick by tick from fromTick to curTick - 1
   371	        // (curTick is still open; we settle through the last closed tick)
   372	        for (uint64 tick = fromTick; tick < curTick; tick++) {
   373	            // 1. Apply upkeep for this tick
   374	            _applyUpkeep(clan, tick);
   375	
   376	            // 2. Wheat plot regrow check (lazy, per tick)
   377	            for (uint256 pi = 0; pi < 2; pi++) {
   378	                WheatPlot storage plot = _wheatPlots[clanId][pi];
   379	                if (plot.state == WheatPlotState.Regrowing && tick >= plot.regrowUntilTick) {
   380	                    plot.state = WheatPlotState.Harvestable;
   381	                    plot.remainingWheat = ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_STARTING_WHEAT;
   382	                    plot.regrowUntilTick = 0;
   383	                }
   384	            }
   385	
   386	            // 3. Advance each clansman (single-tick range: [tick, tick+1))
   387	            for (uint256 i = 0; i < clansmanIds.length; i++) {
   388	                Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[clansmanIds[i]];
   389	                _settleMissionForClansman(clan, cs, clanId, tick, tick + 1);
   390	            }
   391	        }
   392	
   393	        clan.lastSettledTick = curTick;
   394	        emit ClanSettled(clanId, curTick);
   395	    }
   396	
   397	    /// @dev Apply one tick of upkeep. Marks starvation if insufficient food.
   398	    function _applyUpkeep(Clan storage clan, uint64 tick) internal {
   399	        if (clan.livingClansmen == 0) return;
   400	
   401	        uint256 wheatNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   402	        uint256 fishNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.FISH_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   403	
   404	        bool hadEnoughWheat = clan.vaultWheat >= wheatNeeded;
   405	        bool hadEnoughFish = clan.vaultFish >= fishNeeded;
   406	
   407	        if (hadEnoughWheat) {
   408	            clan.vaultWheat -= wheatNeeded;
   409	        } else {
   410	            clan.vaultWheat = 0;
   411	        }
   412	        if (hadEnoughFish) {
   413	            clan.vaultFish -= fishNeeded;
   414	        } else {
   415	            clan.vaultFish = 0;
   416	        }
   417	
   418	        bool starving = !hadEnoughWheat || !hadEnoughFish;
   419	        if (starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick == 0) {
   420	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = tick;
   421	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, true, tick);
   422	        } else if (!starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0) {
   423	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = 0;
   424	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, false, tick);
   425	        }
   426	    }
   427	
   428	    /// @dev Check if a clan is currently starving (lazy read).
   429	    function _isStarving(Clan storage clan) internal view returns (bool) {
   430	        return clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0 && clan.starvationStartsAtTick <= _world.currentTick;
   431	    }
   432	
   433	    /// @dev Resolve an action for a clansman that is in ACTING state.
   434	    function _resolveAction(
   435	        Clan storage clan,
   436	        Clansman storage cs,
   437	        Mission storage m,
   438	        uint32 clanId,
   439	        uint64 tick,
   440	        bytes32 tickSeed
   441	    ) internal {
   442	        bool starving = _isStarving(clan);
   443	        ActionType action = m.action;
   444	
   445	        if (action == ActionType.ChopWood) {
   446	            _gatherWood(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   447	        } else if (action == ActionType.MineIron) {
   448	            _gatherIron(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   449	        } else if (action == ActionType.FishDocks) {
   450	            _gatherFishDocks(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   451	        } else if (action == ActionType.FishDeepSea) {
   452	            _gatherFishDeepSea(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving, tickSeed);
   453	        } else if (action == ActionType.HarvestWheat) {
   454	            _gatherWheat(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, starving);
   455	        } else if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
   456	            // Deposit event ABI intentionally stores the current tick as uint32.
   457	            // forge-lint: disable-next-line(unsafe-typecast)
   458	            _doDeposit(clan, cs, m, clanId, uint32(tick));
   459	        } else if (action == ActionType.Wait) {
   460	            // NOOP — worker stays ACTING (continuous), no transition needed
   461	            // Wait mission is effectively persistent until interrupted
   462	        } else if (action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   463	            // Persistent mission. Registration happens atomically at order submission.
   464	        } else if (
   465	            action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase || action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument
   466	        ) {
   467	            // Phase 1 stub: check homebase, check resources; if ok, stub success
   468	            _doBuilding(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, action);
   469	        } else if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
   470	            _enqueueScheduledMarketAction(clanId, cs.clansmanId, m);
   520	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.IRON_CAP - cs.carryIron;
   521	        if (remaining == 0) {
   522	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   523	            return;
   524	        }
   525	        uint256 yield = ClanWorldConstants.IRON_BASE_YIELD;
   526	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   527	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   528	        cs.carryIron += yield;
   529	
   530	        // Gold bonus roll — scoped to reduce stack depth
   531	        uint256 goldBonus = _rollIronGoldBonus(clan, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick, tickSeed);
   532	
   533	        emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.MineIron, 0, yield, 0, 0, goldBonus, tick);
   534	
   535	        if (cs.carryIron >= ClanWorldConstants.IRON_CAP) {
   536	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   537	        }
   538	    }
   539	
   540	    function _rollIronGoldBonus(Clan storage clan, uint32 clansmanId, uint64 nonce, uint64 tick, bytes32 tickSeed)
   541	        internal
   542	        returns (uint256 goldBonus)
   543	    {
   544	        bytes32 goldRng = keccak256(abi.encode("iron_gold_bonus", tickSeed, clansmanId, nonce, tick));
   545	        if (uint256(goldRng) % 10000 < ClanWorldConstants.GOLD_FROM_IRON_BPS) {
   546	            goldBonus = ClanWorldConstants.GOLD_FROM_IRON_AMOUNT;
   547	            clan.goldBalance += goldBonus;
   548	        }
   549	    }
   550	
   551	    function _gatherFishDocks(
   552	        Clan storage,
   553	        Clansman storage cs,
   554	        Mission storage m,
   555	        uint32 clanId,
   556	        uint64 tick,
   557	        bool starving,
   558	        bytes32 tickSeed
   559	    ) internal {
   560	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP - cs.carryFish;
   561	        if (remaining == 0) {
   562	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   563	            return;
   564	        }
   565	        bytes32 fishRng = keccak256(abi.encode("fish_roll", tickSeed, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick));
   566	        uint256 fishRoll = uint256(fishRng) % 10000;
   567	        uint256 yield = 0;
   568	        if (fishRoll < ClanWorldConstants.FISH_DOCKS_BPS) {
   569	            yield = 1e18;
   570	        }
   571	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   572	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   573	        if (yield > 0) {
   574	            cs.carryFish += yield;
   575	            emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.FishDocks, 0, 0, 0, yield, 0, tick);
   576	        }
   577	        if (cs.carryFish >= ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP) {
   578	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   579	        }
   580	    }
   581	
   582	    function _gatherFishDeepSea(
   583	        Clan storage,
   584	        Clansman storage cs,
   585	        Mission storage m,
   586	        uint32 clanId,
   587	        uint64 tick,
   588	        bool starving,
   589	        bytes32 tickSeed
   590	    ) internal {
   591	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP - cs.carryFish;
   592	        if (remaining == 0) {
   593	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   594	            return;
   595	        }
   596	        bytes32 fishRng = keccak256(abi.encode("fish_roll", tickSeed, cs.clansmanId, m.nonce, tick));
   597	        uint256 fishRoll = uint256(fishRng) % 10000;
   598	        uint256 yield = 0;
   599	        if (fishRoll < ClanWorldConstants.FISH_DEEP_BPS) {
   600	            yield = 1e18;
   601	        }
   602	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   603	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   604	        if (yield > 0) {
   605	            cs.carryFish += yield;
   606	            emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.FishDeepSea, 0, 0, 0, yield, 0, tick);
   607	        }
   608	        if (cs.carryFish >= ClanWorldConstants.FISH_CAP) {
   609	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   610	        }
   611	    }
   612	
   613	    function _gatherWheat(
   614	        Clan storage,
   615	        /* clan — unused but kept positional for callsite parity */
   616	        Clansman storage cs,
   617	        Mission storage m,
   618	        uint32 clanId,
   619	        uint64 tick,
   620	        bool starving
   621	    ) internal {
   622	        uint256 remaining = ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_CAP - cs.carryWheat;
   623	        if (remaining == 0) {
   624	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   625	            return;
   626	        }
   627	        // Determine plot index from region
   628	        uint8 region = m.targetRegion;
   629	        uint256 plotIdx;
   630	        if (region == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS) {
   631	            plotIdx = 0;
   632	        } else if (region == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS) {
   633	            plotIdx = 1;
   634	        } else {
   635	            // Wrong region — complete (no harvest)
   636	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   637	            return;
   638	        }
   639	
   640	        WheatPlot storage plot = _wheatPlots[clanId][plotIdx];
   641	        if (plot.state != WheatPlotState.Harvestable || plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   642	            // Plot not ready — worker waits
   643	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   644	            return;
   645	        }
   646	
   647	        uint256 yield = WHEAT_HARVEST_RATE;
   648	        if (starving) yield = yield / 2;
   649	        if (yield > remaining) yield = remaining;
   650	        if (yield > plot.remainingWheat) yield = plot.remainingWheat;
   651	
   652	        cs.carryWheat += yield;
   653	        plot.remainingWheat -= yield;
   654	
   655	        emit ResourcesGathered(clanId, cs.clansmanId, ActionType.HarvestWheat, 0, 0, yield, 0, 0, tick);
   656	
   657	        if (plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   658	            plot.state = WheatPlotState.Regrowing;
   659	            plot.regrowUntilTick = tick + ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_REGROW_TICKS;
   660	        }
   661	
   662	        if (cs.carryWheat >= ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_CAP || plot.remainingWheat == 0) {
   663	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   664	        }
   665	        // else continuous
   666	    }
   667	
   668	    function _doDeposit(Clan storage clan, Clansman storage cs, Mission storage m, uint32 clanId, uint32 tick)
   669	        internal
   670	    {
   671	        // Must be at homebase region
   672	        if (cs.currentRegion != clan.baseRegion) {
   673	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   674	            return;
   675	        }
   676	        bool hasAnything = cs.carryWood > 0 || cs.carryIron > 0 || cs.carryWheat > 0 || cs.carryFish > 0;
   677	        if (!hasAnything) {
   678	            // Empty deposits are silent no-ops; no zero-delta event for indexers to process.
   679	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   680	            return;
   681	        }
   682	
   683	        uint256 woodDelta = cs.carryWood;
   684	        uint256 ironDelta = cs.carryIron;
   685	        uint256 wheatDelta = cs.carryWheat;
   686	        uint256 fishDelta = cs.carryFish;
   687	
   688	        clan.vaultWood += woodDelta;
   689	        clan.vaultIron += ironDelta;
   690	        clan.vaultWheat += wheatDelta;
   691	        clan.vaultFish += fishDelta;
   692	
   693	        cs.carryWood = 0;
   694	        cs.carryIron = 0;
   695	        cs.carryWheat = 0;
   696	        cs.carryFish = 0;
   697	
   698	        emit ResourcesDeposited(clanId, cs.clansmanId, woodDelta, ironDelta, wheatDelta, fishDelta, tick);
   699	        _completeMission(cs, m);
   700	    }
   701	
   702	    function _doBuilding(
   703	        Clan storage clan,
   704	        Clansman storage cs,
   705	        Mission storage m,
   706	        uint32 clanId,
   707	        uint64 tick,
   708	        ActionType action
   709	    ) internal {
   710	        // Must be at homebase
   711	        if (cs.currentRegion != clan.baseRegion) {
   712	            _completeMission(cs, m);
   713	            return;
   714	        }
   715	
   716	        bool success = false;
   717	        if (action == ActionType.BuildWall) {
   718	            success = _tryBuildWall(clan, clanId, tick);
   719	        } else if (action == ActionType.UpgradeBase) {
   720	            success = _tryUpgradeBase(clan, clanId, tick);

  2125	    /// @notice One-time treasury initialization: register token and pool addresses.
  2126	    ///         Must be called before seedPools. Callable only once.
  2127	    function initTreasury(address[6] calldata tokens, address[4] calldata pools) external override nonReentrant {
  2128	        require(!_treasury.poolsSeeded && _treasury.woodToken == address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury already init");
  2129	        require(msg.sender == _treasury.treasuryOwner, "ClanWorld: not owner");
  2130	
  2131	        _treasury.woodToken = tokens[0];
  2132	        _treasury.ironToken = tokens[1];
  2133	        _treasury.wheatToken = tokens[2];
  2134	        _treasury.fishToken = tokens[3];
  2135	        _treasury.goldToken = tokens[4];
  2136	        _treasury.blueprintToken = tokens[5];
  2137	
  2138	        _treasury.woodGoldPool = pools[0];
  2139	        _treasury.wheatGoldPool = pools[1];
  2140	        _treasury.fishGoldPool = pools[2];
  2141	        _treasury.ironGoldPool = pools[3];
  2142	    }
  2143	
  2144	    /// @notice Owner-only. Seeds the four Unicorn Town AMM pools.
  2145	    function seedPools(PoolSeedConfig calldata cfg) external override nonReentrant {
  2146	        require(msg.sender == _treasury.treasuryOwner, "ClanWorld: not owner");
  2147	        require(!_treasury.poolsSeeded, "ClanWorld: pools already seeded");
  2148	        require(_treasury.woodToken != address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury not init");
  2149	
  2150	        _transferSeed(_treasury.woodToken, _treasury.woodGoldPool, cfg.woodSeed);
  2151	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.woodGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForWood);
  2152	        _transferSeed(_treasury.wheatToken, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, cfg.wheatSeed);
  2153	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForWheat);
  2154	        _transferSeed(_treasury.fishToken, _treasury.fishGoldPool, cfg.fishSeed);
  2155	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.fishGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForFish);
  2156	        _transferSeed(_treasury.ironToken, _treasury.ironGoldPool, cfg.ironSeed);
  2157	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.ironGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForIron);
  2158	
  2159	        StubPool(_treasury.woodGoldPool).seed(cfg.woodSeed, cfg.goldSeedForWood);
  2160	        StubPool(_treasury.wheatGoldPool).seed(cfg.wheatSeed, cfg.goldSeedForWheat);
  2161	        StubPool(_treasury.fishGoldPool).seed(cfg.fishSeed, cfg.goldSeedForFish);
  2162	        StubPool(_treasury.ironGoldPool).seed(cfg.ironSeed, cfg.goldSeedForIron);
  2163	
  2164	        _treasury.poolsSeeded = true;
  2165	
  2166	        emit PoolsSeeded(
  2167	            _treasury.woodGoldPool, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, _treasury.fishGoldPool, _treasury.ironGoldPool
  2168	        );
  2169	    }
  2170	
  2171	    function _transferSeed(address token, address pool, uint256 amount) internal {
  2172	        require(token != address(0) && pool != address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury not init");
  2173	        require(MinimalERC20(token).transferFrom(msg.sender, pool, amount), "ClanWorld: seed transfer failed");

     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	/// @notice Minimal ERC20 boundary token. No external deps.
     5	contract MinimalERC20 {
     6	    string public name;
     7	    string public symbol;
     8	    uint8 public constant decimals = 18;
     9	
    10	    uint256 public totalSupply;
    11	    address public immutable DEPLOYER;
    12	    bool public treasurySeeded;
    13	
    14	    mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf;
    15	    mapping(address => mapping(address => uint256)) public allowance;
    16	
    17	    event Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value);
    18	    event Approval(address indexed owner_, address indexed spender, uint256 value);
    19	
    20	    constructor(string memory name_, string memory symbol_) {
    21	        name = name_;
    22	        symbol = symbol_;
    23	        DEPLOYER = msg.sender;
    24	    }
    25	
    26	    /// @dev Wrapped per forge-lint unwrapped-modifier-logic — keeps modifier
    27	    /// body slim so the require isn't duplicated at every call site.
    28	    function _onlyDeployer() internal view {
    29	        require(msg.sender == DEPLOYER, "MinimalERC20: not deployer");
    30	    }
    31	
    32	    modifier onlyDeployer() {
    33	        _onlyDeployer();
    34	        _;
    35	    }
    36	
    37	    function seedTreasury(address treasury, uint256 amount) external onlyDeployer {
    38	        require(!treasurySeeded, "MinimalERC20: treasury seeded");
    39	        require(treasury != address(0), "MinimalERC20: zero treasury");
    40	
    41	        treasurySeeded = true;
    42	        _mint(treasury, amount);
    43	    }
    44	
    45	    function _mint(address to, uint256 amount) internal {
    46	        totalSupply += amount;
    47	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    48	        emit Transfer(address(0), to, amount);
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    52	        balanceOf[msg.sender] -= amount;
    53	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    54	        emit Transfer(msg.sender, to, amount);
    55	        return true;
    56	    }
    57	
    58	    function transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    59	        allowance[from][msg.sender] -= amount;
    60	        balanceOf[from] -= amount;
    61	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    62	        emit Transfer(from, to, amount);
    63	        return true;
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    67	        allowance[msg.sender][spender] = amount;
    68	        emit Approval(msg.sender, spender, amount);
    69	        return true;
    70	    }
    71	}
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	interface IERC20Balance {
     5	    function balanceOf(address account) external view returns (uint256);
     6	}
     7	
     8	/// @notice Constant-product AMM pool for one resource/gold pair.
     9	///         TOKEN_A is the resource token and TOKEN_B is gold. ClanWorld owns
    10	///         the swap surface because clans use the engine's internal accounting,
    11	///         while the treasury seeds real ERC20 balances into the pool once.
    12	contract StubPool {
    13	    address public immutable TOKEN_A; // resource token
    14	    address public immutable TOKEN_B; // gold token
    15	    address public immutable ENGINE; // ClanWorld address
    16	
    17	    uint256 public reserveA; // resource reserve
    18	    uint256 public reserveB; // gold reserve
    19	
    20	    bool private _seeded;
    21	
    22	    modifier onlyEngine() {
    23	        require(msg.sender == ENGINE, "StubPool: only engine");
    24	        _;
    25	    }
    26	
    27	    constructor(address tokenA_, address tokenB_, address engine_) {
    28	        TOKEN_A = tokenA_;
    29	        TOKEN_B = tokenB_;
    30	        ENGINE = engine_;
    31	    }
    32	
    33	    /// @notice Called by ClanWorld at seedPools time to set initial reserves.
    34	    ///         Can only be called once.
    35	    function seed(uint256 amountA, uint256 amountB) external onlyEngine {
    36	        require(!_seeded, "StubPool: already seeded");
    37	        require(amountA > 0 && amountB > 0, "StubPool: zero seed");
    38	        require(IERC20Balance(TOKEN_A).balanceOf(address(this)) >= amountA, "StubPool: missing token A");
    39	        require(IERC20Balance(TOKEN_B).balanceOf(address(this)) >= amountB, "StubPool: missing token B");
    40	        reserveA = amountA;
    41	        reserveB = amountB;
    42	        _seeded = true;
    43	    }
    44	
    45	    function getAmountOutForExactIn(uint256 amountIn) public view returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    46	        require(amountIn > 0, "StubPool: zero amount");
    47	        require(reserveA > 0 && reserveB > 0, "StubPool: not seeded");
    48	        amountOut = (reserveB * amountIn) / (reserveA + amountIn);
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    function getAmountInForExactOut(uint256 amountOut) public view returns (uint256 amountIn) {
    52	        require(amountOut > 0, "StubPool: zero amount");
    53	        require(amountOut < reserveA, "StubPool: insufficient resource reserve");
    54	        require(reserveB > 0, "StubPool: not seeded");
    55	
    56	        uint256 numerator = reserveB * amountOut;
    57	        uint256 denominator = reserveA - amountOut;
    58	        amountIn = numerator / denominator + (numerator % denominator == 0 ? 0 : 1);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    /// @notice Exact-input sell: resource in, gold out.
    62	    function swapExactInForOut(uint256 amountIn, uint256 minOut) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    63	        return _swapExactInForOut(amountIn, minOut);
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    function _swapExactInForOut(uint256 amountIn, uint256 minOut) internal returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    67	        uint256 priorK = reserveA * reserveB;
    68	        amountOut = getAmountOutForExactIn(amountIn);
    69	        require(amountOut >= minOut, "StubPool: insufficient output");
    70	
    71	        reserveA += amountIn;
    72	        reserveB -= amountOut;
    73	
    74	        require(reserveA * reserveB >= priorK, "StubPool: k invariant");
    75	    }
    76	
    77	    /// @notice Exact-output buy: gold in, exact resource out.
    78	    function swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(uint256 amountOut, uint256 maxIn)
    79	        external
    80	        onlyEngine
    81	        returns (uint256 amountIn)
    82	    {
    83	        return _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(amountOut, maxIn);
    84	    }
    85	
    86	    function _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(uint256 amountOut, uint256 maxIn) internal returns (uint256 amountIn) {
    87	        uint256 priorK = reserveA * reserveB;
    88	        amountIn = getAmountInForExactOut(amountOut);
    89	        require(amountIn <= maxIn, "StubPool: max input exceeded");
    90	
    91	        reserveA -= amountOut;
    92	        reserveB += amountIn;
    93	
    94	        require(reserveA * reserveB >= priorK, "StubPool: k invariant");
    95	    }
    96	
    97	    /// @notice Exact-input sell: clan sells amountIn of resource, gets goldOut.
    98	    ///         Legacy alias for Phase 6.1 scheduled-market code.
    99	    function sellResource(uint256 amountIn) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 goldOut) {
   100	        goldOut = _swapExactInForOut(amountIn, 1);
   101	    }
   102	
   103	    /// @notice Legacy quote alias for exact-output resource buys.
   104	    function quoteBuy(uint256 amountOut) external view returns (uint256 goldIn) {
   105	        goldIn = getAmountInForExactOut(amountOut);
   106	    }
   107	
   108	    /// @notice Exact-output buy: clan buys amountOut of resource, pays goldIn.
   109	    ///         Legacy alias for Phase 6.1 scheduled-market code.
   110	    function buyResource(uint256 amountOut) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 goldIn) {
   111	        goldIn = _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(amountOut, type(uint256).max);
   112	    }
   113	
   114	    function getReserves() external view returns (uint256, uint256) {
   115	        return (reserveA, reserveB);
   116	    }
   117	}

exec

   280	    }
   281	
   282	    function _travelTicks(uint8 fromRegion, uint8 toRegion) private pure returns (uint8) {
   283	        if (fromRegion == 0 || toRegion == 0) return 0; // NOOP region
   284	        if (fromRegion == toRegion) return 0;
   285	        if (fromRegion > 8 || toRegion > 8) return 0;
   286	        return _distMatrix(fromRegion, toRegion);
   287	    }
   288	
   289	    function _addTicksClamped(uint64 tick, uint64 delta) private pure returns (uint64) {
   290	        if (type(uint64).max - tick < delta) return type(uint64).max;
   291	        return tick + delta;
   292	    }
   293	
   294	    // =========================================================================
   295	    // INTERNAL SETTLEMENT
   296	    // =========================================================================
   297	
   298	    /// @dev Settle a single clansman's mission for the tick range [fromTick, toTick).
   299	    ///      Handles all 6 mission lifecycle paths. Called from _settleClan and settleClansman.
   300	    function _settleMissionForClansman(
   301	        Clan storage clan,
   302	        Clansman storage cs,
   303	        uint32 clanId,
   304	        uint64 fromTick,
   305	        uint64 toTick
   306	    ) internal {
   307	        Mission storage m = _missions[cs.clansmanId];
   308	
   309	        // Path 6: dead clansman — invalidate active mission if any
   310	        if (cs.state == ClansmanState.DEAD) {
   311	            if (m.active) {
   312	                if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   313	                    _clearDefender(cs.clansmanId);
   314	                }
   315	                m.active = false; // silent invalidation; dead clansman gets no MissionCompleted
   316	            }
   317	            return;
   318	        }
   319	
   320	        if (!m.active) return; // no active mission — nothing to settle
   321	
   322	        bytes32 tickSeed;
   323	        for (uint64 tick = fromTick; tick < toTick; tick++) {
   324	            tickSeed = _tickSeeds[tick];
   325	
   326	            // Path 1 → Path 2 transition: TRAVELING → ACTING at arrivalTick
   327	            if (cs.state == ClansmanState.TRAVELING && tick >= m.arrivalTick) {
   328	                cs.state = ClansmanState.ACTING;
   329	                cs.currentRegion = m.targetRegion;
   330	                emit WorkerArrived(clanId, cs.clansmanId, m.targetRegion, tick);
   331	
   332	                if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   333	                    _registerDefender(m.targetRegion, clanId, cs.clansmanId);
   334	                }
   335	            }
   336	
   337	            if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) continue; // persistent defender mission
   338	
   339	            // Path 3: ACTING at/past settlesAtTick → resolve
   340	            if (cs.state == ClansmanState.ACTING && tick >= m.settlesAtTick) {
   341	                _resolveAction(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, tickSeed);
   342	                if (m.active && getActionDuration(m.action) > 0) {
   343	                    _completeMission(cs, m);
   344	                }
   345	            }
   346	
   347	            // If mission completed during this tick, stop iterating
   348	            if (!m.active) break;
   349	        }
   350	    }
   351	
   352	    /// @dev Lazy settlement of a clan forward to currentTick.
   353	    ///      Mutates storage. Called before order submission and by public settleClan().
   354	    function _settleClan(uint32 clanId) internal {
   355	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
   356	        if (clan.clanId == 0) return;
   357	
   358	        uint64 curTick = _world.currentTick;
   359	        uint64 fromTick = clan.lastSettledTick;
   360	        if (fromTick >= curTick) return;
   134	enum ActionType {
   135	    None,
   136	    ChopWood,
   137	    MineIron,
   138	    FishDocks,
   139	    FishDeepSea,
   140	    HarvestWheat,
   141	    DepositResources,
   142	    BuildWall,
   143	    UpgradeBase,
   144	    UpgradeMonument,
   145	    DefendBase,
   146	    MarketBuy,
   147	    MarketSell,
   148	    Wait
   149	}
   150	
   151	enum MarketExecutionMode {
   152	    None,
   153	    Immediate,
   154	    Scheduled
   155	}
   156	
   157	enum StatusCode {
   158	    OK,
   159	    ERR_CLAN_DEAD,
   160	    ERR_CLAN_NOT_OWNED,
   161	    ERR_CLANSMAN_DEAD,
   162	    ERR_INVALID_CLANSMAN,
   163	    ERR_INVALID_REGION,
   164	    ERR_INVALID_ACTION,
   165	    ERR_INVALID_TARGET,
   166	    ERR_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE,
   167	    ERR_NOT_WAITING,
   168	    ERR_NOT_IN_UNICORN_TOWN,
   169	    ERR_NOT_AT_HOMEBASE,
   170	    ERR_NOT_AT_TARGET_BASE,
   171	    ERR_NOT_DEFENDABLE,
   172	    ERR_MISSING_RESOURCES,
   173	    ERR_EMPTY_CARGO,
   174	    ERR_PLOT_NOT_READY,
   175	    ERR_PLOT_EMPTY,
   176	    ERR_MARKET_ZERO_AMOUNT,
   177	    ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN,
   178	    ERR_IMMEDIATE_MARKET_NOT_ELIGIBLE,
   179	    ERR_MARKET_BUY_OVER_CAPACITY,
   180	    ERR_WORLD_TICK_MISMATCH,
   280	
   281	struct Mission {
   282	    bool active;
   283	
   284	    uint64 nonce;
   285	    uint64 submittedAtTick;
   286	    uint64 executesAtTick;
   287	    uint64 settlesAtTick;
   288	    uint32 clansmanId;
   289	
   290	    uint8 startRegion;
   291	    uint8 targetRegion;
   292	    ActionType action;
   293	
   294	    uint64 startTick;
   295	    uint64 arrivalTick;
   296	    uint64 actionStartTick;
   297	
   298	    bytes32 missionSeed;
   299	    MarketExecutionMode marketMode;
   300	
   301	    uint32 targetClanId; // DefendBase only
   302	    address marketToken; // market token for buy/sell
   303	    uint256 marketAmount; // exact-in for sell, exact-out for buy
   304	    uint256 maxGoldIn; // market_buy only, 0 otherwise
   305	}
   306	
   307	struct BanditTroop {
   308	    uint32 banditId;
   309	    BanditState state;
   310	
   311	    uint8 currentRegion;
   312	    uint8 attackAttemptsMade;
   313	    uint64 stateEnteredTick;
   314	    uint64 nextActionTick;
   315	
   316	    uint8 tier;
   317	    uint16 attackPower; // derived from tier; tier is canonical (v4.3 §G)
   318	
   319	    uint256 carryWood;
   320	    uint256 carryIron;
   321	    uint256 carryWheat;
   322	    uint256 carryFish;
   323	}

   325	struct ScheduledMarketAction {

   979	    /// @notice Public settlement trigger — lazily settle a clan.
   980	    function settleClan(uint32 clanId) external override nonReentrant {

   983	
   984	    /// @notice Lazily settle a single clansman's mission to current tick. Idempotent.
   985	    ///         Internally settles the entire clan (including upkeep) to guarantee
   986	    ///         correct ordering and prevent double-settlement. Callers may call this
   987	    ///         or settleClan interchangeably; both are safe and idempotent.
   988	    function settleClansman(uint32 csId) external override nonReentrant {
   989	        Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[csId];
   990	        if (cs.clansmanId == 0) return;
   991	        _settleClan(cs.clanId);
   992	    }

  1003	    /// @notice Mint a new clan and spawn its homebase.
  1004	    function mintClan(address to) external override nonReentrant returns (uint32 clanId, uint256 iftTokenId) {
  1005	        require(to != address(0), "ClanWorld: zero address");
  1006	        require(_allClanIds.length < 12, "ClanWorld: max clans");
  1007	        clanId = _nextClanId++;
  1008	        iftTokenId = uint256(clanId); // Phase 1 placeholder; real iNFT is Phase 7
  1009	
  1010	        // Assign homebase region: valid spawn regions are 1,2,4,5,6,7 (not 3=UnicornTown, not 8=DeepSea)
  1011	        uint8[6] memory spawnRegions = [
  1012	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST,
  1013	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_MOUNTAINS,
  1014	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS,
  1015	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS,
  1016	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_DOCKS,
  1017	            ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_DOCKS
  1018	        ];
  1019	        uint8 baseRegion = spawnRegions[(clanId - 1) % 6];
  1020	
  1021	        // Create clan
  1022	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1023	        clan.clanId = clanId;
  1024	        clan.iftTokenId = iftTokenId;
  1025	        clan.owner = to;
  1026	        clan.clanState = ClanState.ACTIVE;
  1027	        clan.baseRegion = baseRegion;
  1028	        clan.baseLevel = 1;
  1029	        clan.wallLevel = 0;
  1030	        clan.monumentLevel = 0;
  1031	        clan.livingClansmen = 4;
  1032	        clan.lastSettledTick = _world.currentTick;
  1033	        clan.starvationStartsAtTick = 0;
  1034	        clan.coldDamage = 0;
  1035	        clan.goldBalance = 3e18; // starter gold per v4 spec §12.5
  1036	        clan.blueprintBalance = 0;
  1037	        // Starting vault per v4 spec §12.4
  1038	        clan.vaultWood = 20e18;
  1039	        clan.vaultIron = 0;
  1040	        clan.vaultWheat = 20e18;
  1041	        clan.vaultFish = 2e18;
  1042	
  1043	        // Wheat plots
  1044	        _wheatPlots[clanId][0] = WheatPlot({
  1045	            state: WheatPlotState.Harvestable,
  1046	            region: ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS,
  1047	            remainingWheat: ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_STARTING_WHEAT,
  1048	            regrowUntilTick: 0
  1049	        });
  1050	        _wheatPlots[clanId][1] = WheatPlot({
  1051	            state: WheatPlotState.Harvestable,
  1052	            region: ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS,
  1053	            remainingWheat: ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_STARTING_WHEAT,
  1054	            regrowUntilTick: 0
  1055	        });
  1056	
  1057	        // Create 4 clansmen
  1058	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  1059	            uint32 csId = _nextClansmanId++;
  1060	            Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[csId];
  1061	            cs.clansmanId = csId;
  1062	            cs.clanId = clanId;
  1063	            cs.state = ClansmanState.WAITING;
  1064	            cs.currentRegion = baseRegion;
  1065	            cs.cooldownEndsAtTs = 0;
  1066	            cs.lastMissionNonce = 0;
  1067	            cs.carryWood = 0;
  1068	            cs.carryIron = 0;
  1069	            cs.carryWheat = 0;
  1070	            cs.carryFish = 0;
  1071	            _clanClansmanIds[clanId].push(csId);
  1072	        }
  1073	
  1074	        _allClanIds.push(clanId);
  1075	
  1076	        emit ClanSpawned(clanId, to, iftTokenId, baseRegion, _world.currentTick);
  1077	        return (clanId, iftTokenId);
  1078	    }
  1079	
  1080	    /// @notice Submit one or more orders for a clan's clansmen. Per-order failures don't revert.
  1081	    function submitClanOrders(uint32 clanId, ClanOrder[] calldata orders)
  1082	        external
  1083	        override
  1084	        nonReentrant
  1085	        returns (OrderResult[] memory results)
  1086	    {
  1087	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
  1088	        require(clan.clanId != 0, "ClanWorld: clan not found");
  1089	        require(clan.owner == msg.sender, "ClanWorld: not clan owner");
  1090	        require(clan.clanState == ClanState.ACTIVE, "ClanWorld: clan dead");
  1091	
  1092	        // Guard: if clan is more than 200 ticks behind, caller must call settleClan() first
  1093	        // (_settleClan caps at 200 ticks per call; submitting into a partially-settled clan corrupts invariants)
  1094	        // ERR_MUST_SETTLE_FIRST not in StatusCode enum — using ERR_INVALID_ACTION as the closest proxy
  1095	        {
  1096	            uint64 lastSettled = _clans[clanId].lastSettledTick;
  1097	            if (_world.currentTick > lastSettled + 200) {
  1098	                results = new OrderResult[](orders.length);
  1099	                for (uint256 i = 0; i < orders.length; i++) {
  1100	                    results[i] = OrderResult({
  1101	                        clansmanId: orders[i].clansmanId,
  1102	                        status: StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION,
  1103	                        cooldownEndsAtTs: 0,
  1104	                        missionNonce: 0,
  1105	                        marketMode: MarketExecutionMode.None
  1106	                    });
  1107	                }
  1108	                return results;
  1109	            }
  1110	        }
  1111	
  1112	        // Lazy settle before processing orders
  1113	        _settleClan(clanId);
  1114	
  1115	        results = new OrderResult[](orders.length);
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	abstract contract ReentrancyGuard {
     5	    uint256 private constant _NOT_ENTERED = 1;
     6	    uint256 private constant _ENTERED = 2;
     7	    uint256 private _reentrancyStatus;
     8	
     9	    constructor() {
    10	        _reentrancyStatus = _NOT_ENTERED;
    11	    }
    12	
    13	    modifier nonReentrant() {
    14	        require(_reentrancyStatus != _ENTERED, "ClanWorld: reentrant call");
    15	        _reentrancyStatus = _ENTERED;
    16	        _;
    17	        _reentrancyStatus = _NOT_ENTERED;
    18	    }
    19	}

codex
The wheelbarrow check is looking more concerning than the pool math: tests mostly set `carry` directly through harnesses, but I’m not finding any production path that loads a clansman’s carry from the vault before a market trip. That means the same-tick “save from raid by carrying it away” behavior is not actually represented.

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"8\\.3|8\\.4|wheelbarrow|Unicorn Town|MarketBuy|MarketSell|carry|vault\" docs packages/contracts -g '*.md'" in /home/claude/code/clan-world
 succeeded in 1ms:
docs/reviews/pr200-synthesis.md:21:| H1: `ClanWorld.sol` OTC `propose*Transfer` / `accept*Transfer` | 5.5 = 1/3 | HIGH | **Stale OTC proposals can drain assets after clan ownership transfer.** Proposal stores `from`, `to`, amounts, expiry — but NOT proposer address or ownership nonce. `accept*Transfer` validates only the current target owner. Clan ownership change after proposal creation = old proposal can debit new owner's clan. **Fix:** store `proposerAddress` AND `proposerOwnerNonce` at propose-time; reject accept if current owner doesn't match (or nonce changed). Affects gold/vault/blueprint/bundled transfers. **Critical for Phase 7 0G iNFT hero phase** (which is where ownership transfer is the demo punchline). |
docs/reviews/pr153-review-claude-opus.md:33:| 1 | `contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol` | 1093–1100 | **Stale queue guard incomplete for same-type mission replacement.** `ScheduledMarketAction` has no `missionNonce` field. Guard only checks `m.action != sma.action`. Replacing MarketSell(wood,100) with MarketSell(iron,50) for the same tick leaves the old queue entry valid — heartbeat executes both with stale parameters. **PR #137 Finding #1 — NOT FIXED.** Wave 2 Agent 2.2 traced full lifecycle confirming exploit: old row runs with wrong asset/size, corrupting vault/pool state. No test covers this scenario. | Correctness |
docs/reviews/pr153-review-claude-opus.md:34:| 2 | `runner/src/runnerCastHeartbeat.ts` | 51–56 | **Runner heartbeat targets World Chain Sepolia (chainId 4801) instead of Base Sepolia (84532).** After the Base Sepolia chain pivot (PR #125), `RealChainClient`, `foundry.toml`, `start-heartbeat-loop.sh`, and `deployments/base-sepolia.json` all target chainId 84532. But `RunnerCastHeartbeat` still defines `worldChainSepolia` with `id: 4801`. Signed transactions carry wrong chain ID — they will fail, target the wrong network, or suffer replay-protection mismatch. Wave 2 confirmed this is stale config, not intentional. | Correctness |
docs/reviews/pr153-review-claude-opus.md:137:Agent 1.6 flagged a chain config split. Agent 2.1 and 2.3 both independently confirmed: `runnerCastHeartbeat.ts` defines `worldChainSepolia` with `id: 4801`, while every other component (IChainClient, foundry.toml, deployments/base-sepolia.json, start-heartbeat-loop.sh) targets Base Sepolia (`id: 84532`). This is stale configuration from before the Base Sepolia pivot (PR #125). Signed transactions carry wrong chain ID and will fail or target the wrong network.
docs/reviews/pr153-review-claude-opus.md:146:- Same-type replacement (MarketSell→MarketSell) appends new row without invalidating old
docs/reviews/pr153-review-claude-opus.md:235:- **Finding #1** (stale queue guard) is an **economic integrity bug** — stale market orders can execute with wrong parameters, corrupting vault and pool state.
docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-opus-4-7.md:10:Phase 7 was implemented against a 5-line checklist ("implement gold transfer", "implement vault transfer", etc.) plus the v4.2 sync-call signatures (`transferGold/transferVaultResource/transferBlueprint/transferBundle`) and v4.3 §M.1 dead-clan rule. The propose/accept/cancel pattern, `expiryTick` semantics, replay-flag design, and self-transfer/zero-amount handling are **all implementer choices with no written spec backing**.
docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:11:This is the most actionable super-swarm result so far. All 3 reviewers found the same fundamental issues + each surfaced unique critical findings. Phase 8 ships the right shape (queue-time vault reservation, score/rank getters) but the reservation/refund lifecycle has multiple silent-resource-loss paths.
docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:17:| H1 | `ClanWorld.sol` `_processOrder`, `_validate*Upgrade*`, `_settle*Upgrade*` | 5.4 + 5.5 + 4.7 = **3/3** | HIGH | **Upgrade reservations debit vault at submit-time, not at homebase-arrival.** Spec §8 (`clanworld_v4_spec.md:882, :941`): build "not instant at submission time" — checked "if a clansman reaches homebase and attempts a build action." Impl debits during `_processOrder` even before travel completes. Affects upkeep + score + bandit-loot timing while builder is traveling. **Fix:** defer debit to settle-time (when clansman reaches homebase + ACTING tick). |
docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:19:| H3 | `ClanWorld.sol:2274, 2300, 2351` (`quoteLootValueSettled`, `_getClanScore`, `getRankings`) | 5.4 + 5.5 + 4.7 = **3/3** | HIGH | **Rank getters read raw committed storage, NOT settled/derived path.** Violates Phase 8.4 / #261 derived-getter contract from earlier today. Pending upkeep/deposits/deaths produce stale scores. **Regression of #230 fix.** Fix: rewire getters through `_simulateSettleToTick` per #261. |
docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:26:| H5 | `ClanWorld.sol:544-559` (`_markClansmanDead`), `:565-591` (`_markClanDead`) | 4.7 = 1/3 | HIGH | **Cold-damage + starvation deaths DON'T refund upgrade reservations.** `_markClansmanDead` sets `cs.state = DEAD; m.active = false;` immediately. The death-path refund branch in `_settleMissionForClansman:349-364` gates on `if (m.active)` — already false. Permanent vault resource loss + `_pending*UpgradesByClan` counter never decrements → eventually blocks ALL future upgrades. **Phase 4.4 winter cold damage already ships this regression.** Fix: extract `_invalidateActiveMission` helper that calls refund THEN sets m.active=false. Apply in `_markClansmanDead` + `_markClanDead`. |
docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:60:1. **H1:** defer upgrade vault debit to settle-time, not submit-time
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:19:Phase 8 ships: wall upgrades (8.1) + base upgrades (8.2) + monument upgrades w/ blueprint gating L7-10 (8.3) + score / rank getters (8.4). Builds on Phase 5 vault + Phase 9 blueprint reward.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:26:5. Phase 8.4 leaderboard correctness (uses derived getters per #261 fix)

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6067:docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-codex-5-5.md:7104:  Proposals store `from`, `to`, amounts, expiry, and flags, but not the proposer address, owner at proposal time, or an owner/IFT nonce. `accept*Transfer` validates only the current target owner. If `fromClan.owner` changes after proposal creation, the target can still accept and debit the new owner’s clan. This affects gold, vault, blueprint, and bundled transfers. Store proposer/owner nonce and require it at accept, or invalidate open proposals on ownership transfer.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6070:docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-codex-5-5.md:7155:  Proposals store `from`, `to`, amounts, expiry, and flags, but not the proposer address, owner at proposal time, or an owner/IFT nonce. `accept*Transfer` validates only the current target owner. If `fromClan.owner` changes after proposal creation, the target can still accept and debit the new owner’s clan. This affects gold, vault, blueprint, and bundled transfers. Store proposer/owner nonce and require it at accept, or invalidate open proposals on ownership transfer.

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6171:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-opus-4-7.md:16:- v4.3 §K: *"`ERR_CARRY_FULL` is especially relevant for explicit market buy validation… requested output cannot fit remaining carry capacity"*
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6172:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-opus-4-7.md:24:The buy path is **internally contradictory** — it gates on worker carry capacity but mutates vault, so the carry-cap check no longer reflects what the action actually does. Practical consequences: a worker with full carry but an empty vault is rejected from buying; a worker physically present at UT with carry to sell is irrelevant — only the clan's homebase vault is consulted (vault is at the homebase, far from UT).
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6174:docs/reviews/pr137-review-claude-opus.md:66:| 15 | `src/ClanWorld.sol` | 1078–1103 | **Leading underscore on `external` functions.** `_executeMarketSellExternal` / `_executeMarketBuyExternal` use internal naming convention on external visibility. Justified by try/catch pattern but unconventional. Agent 7. | **DEFER** |

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6274:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-codex-5-4.md:10907:  Market I/O is using the wrong balance domain. Sells read/deduct `clan.vault*`, and buys credit `clan.vault*`, while submission still rejects buys based on worker carry capacity. Per the Phase 6 market spec, `market_sell` is from worker carry and `market_buy` returns to worker carry. As shipped, a clansman can liquidate home-vault inventory without hauling it to Unicorn Town, and bought goods become instantly eligible for upkeep/bandit theft without a deposit trip. The tests lock this in (`packages/contracts/test/ClanWorld.t.sol:775-888, 1013-1085, 1485-1490`).
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6275:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-codex-5-4.md:10939:  Market I/O is using the wrong balance domain. Sells read/deduct `clan.vault*`, and buys credit `clan.vault*`, while submission still rejects buys based on worker carry capacity. Per the Phase 6 market spec, `market_sell` is from worker carry and `market_buy` returns to worker carry. As shipped, a clansman can liquidate home-vault inventory without hauling it to Unicorn Town, and bought goods become instantly eligible for upkeep/bandit theft without a deposit trip. The tests lock this in (`packages/contracts/test/ClanWorld.t.sol:775-888, 1013-1085, 1485-1490`).

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6340:docs/planning/phase-3-test-spec.md:404:score = vaultGold + (workers * N) + (wallTier * M) + (monumentTier * K) - banditDamageTaken
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6342:docs/planning/phase-3-test-spec.md:411:**Setup:** Clan A has higher score than Clan B. Bandit attacks Clan A (defender loss) — Clan A takes vault loss.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6343:docs/planning/phase-3-test-spec.md:415:**Assert:** Scores reflect vault/wall damage. Rank may have changed if Clan B now scores higher.

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:7197:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:5625:docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-codex-5-5.md:6448:packages/contracts/test/ClanWorld.t.sol:1759:        // Send clansman to homebase to DepositResources (empty carry -> completes when the arrival tick closes).
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:7211:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:5646:docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-codex-5-5.md:7104:  Proposals store `from`, `to`, amounts, expiry, and flags, but not the proposer address, owner at proposal time, or an owner/IFT nonce. `accept*Transfer` validates only the current target owner. If `fromClan.owner` changes after proposal creation, the target can still accept and debit the new owner’s clan. This affects gold, vault, blueprint, and bundled transfers. Store proposer/owner nonce and require it at accept, or invalidate open proposals on ownership transfer.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:7212:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:5647:docs/reviews/pr200-codereview-codex-5-5.md:7155:  Proposals store `from`, `to`, amounts, expiry, and flags, but not the proposer address, owner at proposal time, or an owner/IFT nonce. `accept*Transfer` validates only the current target owner. If `fromClan.owner` changes after proposal creation, the target can still accept and debit the new owner’s clan. This affects gold, vault, blueprint, and bundled transfers. Store proposer/owner nonce and require it at accept, or invalidate open proposals on ownership transfer.
